title: Streaming Response Handling
description: Handle streamed chat completion chunks: accumulate tokens, detect tool calls, emit events, finalize response
key_components: TResponseStreamEvent (TypeAlias for OpenAI Responses API events)
entry_point: ChatCmplStreamHandler.handle_stream(response: Response, stream: AsyncStream[ChatCompletionChunk], model: str | None) -> AsyncIterator[TResponseStreamEvent]
streaming_state_fields: started: bool — whether ResponseCreatedEvent has been emitted
function_calls: dict[int, ResponseFunctionToolCall] — keyed by tc_delta.index
function_call_streaming: dict[int, bool] — True once OutputItemAdded emitted
function_call_output_idx: dict[int, int] — output_index per function call
thinking_text: str — accumulated Anthropic thinking text
thinking_signature: str | None — Anthropic thinking signature
provider_data: dict[str, Any] — model, response_id for non-OpenAI endpoints
activity_flow: BEGIN LOOP: async for chunk in stream
Update usage if chunk.usage is not None
GUARD: if no chunk.choices or no delta → CONTINUE
BRANCH A — Thinking blocks (Anthropic, delta.thinking_blocks exists):
If first occurrence: create ResponseReasoningItem, yield ResponseOutputItemAddedEvent
If active_reasoning_summary_index is None: append Summary to item, yield ResponseReasoningSummaryPartAddedEvent
If first occurrence: create ResponseReasoningItem with content=[], yield ResponseOutputItemAddedEvent
TRANSITION: If reasoning was active AND active_summary open AND new content/refusal/tool_calls arriving:
BRANCH D — Regular text content (delta.content is not None):
If first text chunk: compute content_index, create ResponseOutputText, create ResponseOutputMessage(status='in_progress')
yield ResponseOutputItemAddedEvent (output_index = 0 or 1 based on reasoning)
If first refusal chunk: compute refusal_index, create ResponseOutputRefusal, create ResponseOutputMessage(status='in_progress')
If new index: create ResponseFunctionToolCall(arguments='', name='', call_id='')
Capture provider_specific_fields / extra_content for Gemini thought_signature
IF not yet streaming AND name AND call_id present:
IF was streaming: yield ResponseOutputItemDoneEvent(item with full arguments)
IF NOT streaming (fallback — name never arrived mid-stream):
If text or refusal content: create final ResponseOutputMessage(status='completed'), yield ResponseOutputItemDoneEvent
Build final_response = response.model_copy() with output=outputs, usage=ResponseUsage(...)
helper_methods: _finish_reasoning_summary_part(state, sequence_number) -> Iterator[TResponseStreamEvent]: yields ResponseReasoningSummaryPartDoneEvent; resets active_reasoning_summary_index

_finish_reasoning_item(state, sequence_number) -> Iterator[TResponseStreamEvent]: calls _finish_reasoning_summary_part OR yields ResponseReasoningTextDoneEvent; then yields ResponseOutputItemDoneEvent; sets reasoning_item_done=True
emitted_event_sequence: ResponseOutputItemAddedEvent — per reasoning/assistant message/function call start
ResponseReasoningSummaryPartAddedEvent — per reasoning summary segment start
ResponseReasoningSummaryPartDoneEvent — when reasoning summary segment ends
ResponseContentPartAddedEvent — when text or refusal output starts
ResponseOutputItemDoneEvent — per reasoning item / function call / assistant message done
ResponseContentPartDoneEvent — when text/refusal content part closes
ResponseCompletedEvent — final event, carries full assembled Response
stream_event_types: RawResponsesStreamEvent(data: TResponseStreamEvent, type='raw_response_event') — raw LLM events passed through
RunItemStreamEvent(name, item: RunItem, type='run_item_stream_event') — higher-level item events
AgentUpdatedStreamEvent(new_agent: Agent, type='agent_updated_stream_event') — agent handoff notification
key_conditions_and_branches: First chunk guard: state.started=False → emit ResponseCreatedEvent once
Reasoning-to-content transition: close open reasoning summary part before text/refusal/tool
Function call streaming: only start streaming when BOTH name AND call_id are known
Function call fallback: if name never arrived, emit added+delta+done atomically after stream
Anthropic thinking: accumulate text+signature during stream, attach to reasoning_item at finalization
Content index offsets: text/refusal/function output_index offset = count of prior reasoning + text + refusal items
provider_compatibility_notes: OpenAI: standard ChatCompletion chunks with usage in last chunk
LiteLLM: may not set chunk.usage; delta.refusal may be missing
Anthropic (via LiteLLM): thinking_blocks on delta; needs signature in encrypted_content
Gemini (via LiteLLM): tool_call.id has __thought__ suffix; cleaned by ChatCmplHelpers.clean_gemini_tool_call_id; thought_signature in provider_specific_fields or extra_content
dependencies: ChatCmplStreamHandler uses FAKE_RESPONSES_ID from fake_id module
ChatCmplStreamHandler yields TResponseStreamEvent (OpenAI Responses API event types)
stream_events.py imports from items (RunItem, TResponseStreamEvent) and agent (Agent)
